column1: Note: Only one neighborhood at a time can be selected. Jan 2016 and Q4 2024 listings are missing; 2017 data are suppressed (Jan-Jun missing). Neighborhoods with <5 listings in any year for a given unit type are suppressed for all years. Listings <1 SD below the city mean (rooms, parking, non-units) are excluded.
Source: Mayor's Office of Housing using Craigslist rental listings recieved from MAPC, City of Boston Planning Department Research Division analysis
